steps.title: Find the consequence
steps.content: Photogrammetry and polygonal modeling require processing shapes in the thousands. Surface model methods require processors to manage polygons in the millions, so the earlier methods are more economical as a result.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: A gives an example, B signals replacement or contrast, and D signals specification. The second sentence draws a consequence from the lower processing demands. The answer is C.
